hints.text: US state; most common plate is **all-yellow** (Gen4 can show one w/ a big orange circle); front plates required
Alaska **highway shield has the Big Dipper** constellation (bottom-left) — unique tell
Tall **snow-covered mountains** on much coverage; trees thinner & less broad-leaved than the lower 48
Lots of **Gen2** (rare elsewhere in the US), Gen4 **smallcam**, and **shitcam** (faded, low-res, big bottom blur) — Alaska is the only US state where shitcam is prevalent
Interior/north = **tundra/subarctic** (short trees, low undergrowth); the **Alaska pipeline** is often visible from roads (nothing like it in the rest of the US)
Only 2 urban areas: **Anchorage** (Gen4 + suburbs concentrated here) & **Fairbanks**; panhandle towns (Alexander Archipelago) = wooden buildings + misty Gen2; Juneau = capital
